analysis.reasoning: Core message: China has resumed a large share of key projects while managing COVID-19 prevention in parallel, citing high resumption rates and specific infrastructure sectors. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral) – not mentioned or implied. CH2 (China benevolent internationally) – focus is domestic recovery, not international cooperation; not supported. CH3 (epic history/adversity) – no historical framing; not supported. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – implicitly showcases effective governance balancing health and development, but it doesn’t explicitly advocate the political system or values; evidence is insufficient. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – yes: emphasizes successful resumption of economic activity and major infrastructure projects under government management, indicating effective governance and development. CH6 (culture/nature) – not relevant.
